purpose: Phase 7 tests whether the action triangle (Strike/Feint/Full Guard per PP-294) resolves the dominance found in Phase 6. Adds Feint and Full Guard alongside Strike, with AI strategies for each side. Compares three modes: strike_only (Phase 6 baseline), smart (both sides AI), underdog_feint (disadvantaged side actively Feints).

entries.section: §dice — derived from face distribution at TN 7

entries.quoted_text: Pool reduction floor: Minimum 1D (B cannot be reduced below 1D by Feint)
Player chooses N dice (minimum 3) to Offence for feint; remainder to Defence

entries.section: §Damage Formula — Light Blade Cut vs None

entries.quoted_text: Critical Hit (net hits >= 4): weapon modifier doubled before applying armour reduction. (PP-717 — raised from >= 3.)
Architecture C — sim consistency with v27/Phase 4/5/6

entries.value: higher Attunement; ties to higher Agility (PP-239)
entries.quoted_text: Initiative determines declaration order, not action speed. Higher initiative = more information.

entries.value: Roll Off vs Def; on margin > 0, opponent loses [margin] dice next round; floor 1D; non-stacking
entries.quoted_text: Roll: N dice TN 7 vs opponent's Defence pool TN 7. Payoff: B loses [margin] dice from total pool next round. Non-stacking: Successive Feints reset reduction to current margin; do not accumulate.

entries.value: restores Stamina up to base value (Action cost 3)
entries.quoted_text: Take a Breath restores Stamina up to base value

sim_limitations: Smart AI heuristics are demonstrably under-tuned — produces 100% Fast in Smart-vs-Smart (Feint applies asymmetrically to higher-pool side); Underdog_Feint mode approximates skilled-underdog play
No Initiative knowledge asymmetry (PP-232 init holder declares last) — both sides choose actions simultaneously in this sim
Single weapon (Light Blade Cut) and armour (None)
key_finding: Action triangle (specifically PP-294 Feint mechanic) is a load-bearing lever for combat balance. When disadvantaged side actively Feints, Agi-dominance inverts: Fast 96.7% conditional win drops to 34.9%. End-dominance similarly collapses from 82% to ~7% with tactical play. Combat balance lives in the action triangle, not the pool formula. Pool formula determines tempo, not outcome.
